title: The Raid on Onigashima Begins
description: On pages 5–8, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Jinbe, Unknown person #6, Luffy, Kinemon, Unknown person #7 as The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
scene: The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Everyone left.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: We'll catch up in no time!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmm? I remember these from our battle in fishman island!!

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Nah jinbei, these are new models!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Kurosai FR-U

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Number 4!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Just call it Kurosai for short!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Branchio Tank Number 5!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I run this tank!! Call me Commander Chopper!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Awesome! With this we can advance safely!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're too cool, Chobro!()

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think we had this on the sunny!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Leave it to me!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Where's Luffy?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well, when kid's crew rushed in from the front,

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: They don't even know Kinemon's plan!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll stop them! You guys take it easy!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's definitely getting spotted!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Luffy's getting spotted! Let me make sure he goes discreetly!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: He's for sure getting lost!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Let those idiots follow their devices!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How about we just rendezvous in the battlefield instead, Nami-san?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We're Occupied!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Come on, usopp! is that place like a paradise or something?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I might let you in if you were fit to drive such artillery like this, but I doubt it.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You mind taking a ride on the back?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: me? I'd love to!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Thank you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Huhh? This was obviously an offer for the lady!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A ride-along between guys isn't bad either! YOHO40!!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Commander Chopper!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We'll head to the back of the island and station the vehicles there, got it?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: May the luck of war shine down upon us!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Robin-chan! Wouldn't() you want to ride with me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No thanks, I'll pass.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That tank is very dusty at the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I'll just walk instead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This crew is as lively as always.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: While others usually hold their breaths in a war like this,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Those who take the situation lightly can become crucial factors!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Such mature words! What a relief!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hope I can provide more valuable input like this in the battle and on the crew!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Raid on Onigashima Begins storyline with 42 dialogue beats. The alliance launches the Onigashima raid, exposes betrayal, and collides with Kaido’s forces as the final battle setup begins.
